title: Human-Centred AI Evaluation Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of designing, testing, and refining an AI system with a focus on human needs, fairness, and accountability, culminating in a final evaluation.
relationships: Sequential flow with iterative loops from 'Gather Feedback & Monitor' back to 'Design & Develop AI Model' and 'Test for Fairness & Bias' to represent continuous improvement, with all steps leading to the final examination as a summative assessment point
